© 2026 MONARCHINTEL — FAN PROJECT
MonarchIntel is an independent fan project. Godzilla, Kong, and all MonsterVerse properties are owned by Toho Co., Ltd. and Legendary Entertainment.

Watch Order

// MISSION_ARCHIVE 34 ENTRIES
The complete MonsterVerse viewing guide — every film, series, and special, with platforms, ratings, and Titan appearances. Filter by era or search by title.

// TITAN_ENCYCLOPEDIA 48 TITANS
Complete Monarch intelligence profiles for every classified Titan in the MonsterVerse — classification, powers, origin, threat assessment, and field notes.

Episode Tracker

// SERIES_ARCHIVE 36 EPISODES
Season-by-season breakdowns for every MonsterVerse television production — air dates, synopses, and Titan appearances.

Size Comparison

// BIOMETRIC_DATA 20 TITANS
Monarch biometric height data for all classified Titans — scaled to accurate proportions. Reference: 1.8m average human height.

Titan Relationships

// ALPHA_HIERARCHY INTERACTIVE
The MonsterVerse alpha hierarchy and inter-Titan relationships — drag nodes to explore. Lines show documented interactions from Monarch field reports.

Battle Simulator

Select two Titans and run a Monarch combat analysis — scored on strength, abilities, and documented battle history. No AI required; pure Monarch data.

Monarch Timeline

// CHRONOLOGICAL_RECORD 21 EVENTS
The definitive MonsterVerse chronology — from the first life on Earth to the current era of Titan emergence. In-universe dates as recorded by Monarch.

Dossier Generator

// CLASSIFIED_INTEL AI-POWERED
Create a classified Monarch field report for any Titan — real or imagined. Powered by Claude AI, styled as an authentic Monarch Sciences document.
📋
DOSSIER GENERATOR
The full Dossier Generator is a dedicated page in your Astro project at /dossier — built and ready to go.
Copy dossier.astro → src/pages/dossier.astro in your project
